message:
fix(server): use runtime repl_timeout for replica handshake read timeout and format validate_read_path calls

Replica handshake was using a hardcoded 50ms read timeout instead of the
runtime-configurable repl_timeout_sec, causing premature timeouts when
primary servers are slow to respond. Extracts replica_handshake_read_timeout()
that reads from runtime.server.repl_timeout_sec (minimum 1 second).

New test replica_handshake_timeout_uses_runtime_repl_timeout verifies that
CONFIG SET repl-timeout flows through to the handshake timeout.

Also applies rustfmt to validate_read_path call sites in handle_readable
(line wrapping for readability).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
